Turn Discord into a Searchable Database: NEW OpenClaw Update

Stop struggling with Discord's broken search and start querying your server history like a professional database. This video introduces Discrawl, a powerful tool that indexes Discord messages into SQLite for instant searching and AI agent integration.

00:00 - Intro: The Discord Database
00:20 - Why Discord Search is Broken
01:03 - Introducing Discrawl
01:52 - How to Set Up Your Bot
02:21 - Syncing and Live Tail Mode
02:53 - Running Powerful SQL Queries
03:34 - AI Agents & Local Databases
06:13 - Installation and Tech Stack
